title: Platform Sutra: Sudden Enlightenment
description: The Sixth Patriarch of Chan Buddhism teaches that enlightenment is sudden, not gradual — mind itself is Buddha.
introduction: The Sixth Patriarch of Chan Buddhism teaches that enlightenment is sudden, not gradual — mind itself is Buddha.

translation.original_text: 菩提本無樹，明鏡亦非台。本來無一物，何處惹塵埃。
translation.text: Bodhi originally has no tree. The mirror also has no stand. Originally there is not a single thing — where could dust alight?
